title: sambucus racemosa f. aurantiaca
intro: Sambucus racemosa f. aurantiaca is a variety of the American red-berried elder, a shrub-like plant native to North America, known for its vibrant orange-red berries and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa f. aurantiaca include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy for seasonal infections. Herbal preparations of Sambucus racemosa f. aurantiaca can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and syrups, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from sinus infections to arthritis.
